abilities.name: Delta Support
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have a Supporter card with Holon in its name in your hand, you may use the effect of that card as the effect of this power. (The Supporter card is still discarded.) This power can't be used if Chimecho is affected by a Special Condition.

tests.name: delta_support_holon_supporter
tests.description: Test Delta Support allows using Holon Supporter from hand
